testcase.name: test_admin_email_gets_admin_role

failure.message: AssertionError: expected role=admin, got None assert None == 'admin' + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf9eb243b4e40>('role') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf9eb243b4e40> = {'email': 'mytaxicloud@gmail.com', 'name': 'Admin User', 'picture': '', 'user_id': 'user_test_77b941a9'}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_welcome_admin.py:78: in test_admin_email_gets_admin_role assert data.get("role") == "admin", f"expected role=admin, got {data.get('role')}" E AssertionError: expected role=admin, got None E assert None == 'admin' E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf9eb243b4e40>('role') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf9eb243b4e40> = {'email': 'mytaxicloud@gmail.com', 'name': 'Admin User', 'picture': '', 'user_id': 'user_test_77b941a9'}.get

testcase.name: test_regular_email_gets_user_role

failure.message: AssertionError: assert None == 'user' + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf9eb215bef80>('role') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf9eb215bef80> = {'email': 'test_regular_78e490@example.com', 'name': 'Regular User', 'picture': '', 'user_id': 'user_test_b4f5ef31'}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_welcome_admin.py:90: in test_regular_email_gets_user_role assert data.get("role") == "user" E AssertionError: assert None == 'user' E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf9eb215bef80>('role') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf9eb215bef80> = {'email': 'test_regular_78e490@example.com', 'name': 'Regular User', 'picture': '', 'user_id': 'user_test_b4f5ef31'}.get
